legacy.content:
# Phase 35-01 Summary: Multi-space explorer baseline
## Completed
1. Standardized content space wording to feature-first naming in Space Explorer (content features + power features). 2. Kept runtime space switching stable (`content`, `action`, `event`, `effect`) with behavior lens controls. 3. Added an in-browser model schema builder for flexible feature subsets across spaces. 4. Added in-browser feature schema generation and export of a content-pack patch JSON. 5. Preserved non-MCP policy runner integration for browser-generated reports.
## Remaining (Phase 35)
1. Feature filters sourced directly from `featureSchema.spaces`. 2. Baseline vs candidate vector comparison mode. 3. Optional one-click publish flow from patch JSON to GitHub release artifact.
## Verification
- `pnpm --dir docs-site run typecheck` passed. - `pnpm --dir docs-site run report:vector-usage` passed.
